prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this! Remember, the hardest part is just getting started. Once you take that first step, momentum will carry you forward. Trust your abilities, stay focused, and take it one small step at a time. Every bit of progress counts, and before you know it, you'll have conquered that task. You're stronger and more capable than you think—go show that challenge who's boss!
